title: Quantum Oracle Sketching — LS-SVM Classification
subtitle: Streaming-data binary classification via QOS-built block encoding + QSVT-based linear-system solving + interferometric-shadow readout
description: End-to-end LS-SVM (least-squares SVM) on toy synthetic data using the three-stage QOS pipeline: stage 1 sketches the matrix-element oracle for X^T X + λI from training samples, stage 2 inverts via QSVT, stage 3 reads out the classification sign with interferometric classical shadows. Reproduces the spirit of Theorem 3 of Zhao et al. (2026).
